inputs.label: Vehicle Price
inputs.businessContext: The total price of the motorcycle before any additional taxes, down payment, or trade-in.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total price of the motorcycle before any additional taxes, down payment, or trade-in.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi, peşinat veya takas öncesi motosikletin toplam fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Gesamtpreis des Motorrads vor zusätzlichen Steuern, Anzahlung oder Inzahlungnahme.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix total de la moto avant taxes, acompte ou reprise.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio total de la motocicleta antes de impuestos adicionales, pago inicial o valor de permuta.

inputs.label: Down Payment
inputs.businessContext: Initial cash amount paid upfront to reduce the loan principal.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial cash amount paid upfront to reduce the loan principal.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredi anaparasını azaltmak için peşin ödenen nakit miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anfänglicher Barzahlungsbetrag, der zur Reduzierung des Darlehensbetrags gezahlt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant initial payé comptant pour réduire le capital du prêt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad inicial en efectivo pagada por adelantado para reducir el capital del préstamo.

inputs.label: Trade-in Value
inputs.businessContext: Value of a vehicle traded in as part of the purchase, reducing the amount to finance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of a vehicle traded in as part of the purchase, reducing the amount to finance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Satın alma sırasında takas edilen aracın değeri, finanse edilecek tutarı azaltır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert des Fahrzeugs, das als Teil des Kaufs in Zahlung gegeben wird, wodurch der zu finanzierende Betrag reduziert wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur d'un véhicule repris dans le cadre de l'achat, réduisant le montant à financer.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de un vehículo entregado como parte de la compra, reduciendo el monto a financiar.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Yearly interest rate of the loan, expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Yearly interest rate of the loan, expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredinin yıllık faiz oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährlicher Zinssatz des Darlehens, ausgedrückt in Prozent.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt annuel du prêt, exprimé en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés anual del préstamo, expresada como porcentaje.

inputs.label: Loan Term
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the loan repayment period in months.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the loan repayment period in months.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kredi geri ödeme süresinin ay cinsinden süresi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de remboursement du prêt en mois.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del período de pago del préstamo en meses.

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable sales tax percentage added to the vehicle price.

label_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto a las ventas

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable sales tax percentage added to the vehicle price.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Araç fiyatına eklenen geçerli satış vergisi yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anwendbarer Umsatzsteuersatz in Prozent, der zum Fahrzeugpreis hinzugefügt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de taxe de vente applicable ajouté au prix du véhicule.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de impuesto a las ventas aplicable añadido al precio del vehículo.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
